summary: Second-target review required now because candidate target, transport parity, backup parity, diagnostics parity, rollback parity, docs contract, acceptance recipe, and operator ownership are all present.
nextActions: Open second-target review for debian-12-systemd-tailscale before widening supported-target claims beyond ubuntu-24.04-systemd-tailscale.
Keep controller, CLI, Web, and docs contract wording aligned while review validates parity evidence.
Gate any support claim on acceptance proof, operator ownership, and rollback rehearsal evidence.

reviewPacketReadiness.summary: Review-packet artifact coverage is complete for debian-12-systemd-tailscale; re-read /second-target-policy-pack and open second-target review instead of inventing new guide work.
reviewPacketReadiness.requiredNextAction: Open bounded second-target review and confirm every parity criterion against the preserved Debian 12 packet.

reviewPacketTemplate.summary: Review-packet capture stays explicit for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: preserve one bounded evidence bundle before widening support claims.

requiredEvidence.label: Bootstrap transport parity
requiredEvidence.summary: Capture one bootstrap operation id, result summary, and linked audit/event reference for the Debian 12 candidate host.

requiredEvidence.label: Steady-state transport parity
requiredEvidence.summary: Capture steady-state `/health` and `/runtime-state` evidence after one normal controller-driven mutation.

requiredEvidence.label: Backup and restore parity
requiredEvidence.summary: Capture backup manifest linkage, remote-backup result if configured, and restore outcome notes from the same review packet.

requiredEvidence.label: Diagnostics parity
requiredEvidence.summary: Capture diagnostics artifact paths plus linked controller event references for the candidate host after transport rehearsal.

requiredEvidence.label: Rollback parity
requiredEvidence.summary: Capture rollback-point linkage, rollback result summary, and post-rollback diagnostics in the same packet.

bootstrapProofCapture.summary: Bootstrap-proof capture is already preserved for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: keep the captured Debian 12 bundle linked while the remaining packet sections are completed.

requiredArtifacts.label: Bootstrap operation id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the bootstrap operation id so every later proof reference points to one bounded controller record.

requiredArtifacts.label: Bootstrap result summary
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the terminal bootstrap result summary that states whether the candidate host reached ready or stayed degraded.

requiredArtifacts.label: Audit or replay reference
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one linked event replay or audit-index reference that preserves the bootstrap evidence bundle.

requiredArtifacts.label: Target profile confirmation
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture confirmation that the candidate host stayed on debian-12-systemd-tailscale for the same bootstrap proof.

steadyStateProofCapture.summary: Steady-state proof capture is already preserved for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: keep the captured Debian 12 post-bootstrap mutation, /health, /runtime-state, and audit bundle linked while the remaining packet sections are completed.

requiredArtifacts.label: Post-mutation operation id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one normal controller-driven mutation id after bootstrap so steady-state proof stays anchored to real controller traffic.

requiredArtifacts.label: Health capture
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the steady-state `/health` response after the post-bootstrap mutation completes.

requiredArtifacts.label: Runtime-state capture
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the steady-state `/runtime-state` response from the same candidate host after the mutation.

requiredArtifacts.label: Controller audit reference
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one linked controller event replay or audit-index reference that ties the mutation and steady-state captures together.

backupRestoreProofCapture.summary: Backup-and-restore proof capture is already preserved for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: keep the bounded backup operation, manifest lineage, remote-backup result, and restore-readiness bundle linked while diagnostics and rollback sections are completed.

requiredArtifacts.label: Backup-bearing operation id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one bounded backup operation id that produced the preserved backup bundle used for the Debian 12 review packet.

requiredArtifacts.label: Backup manifest path
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the backup manifest path linked to the same mutation so artifact lineage stays explicit.

requiredArtifacts.label: Remote-backup result
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the remote-backup result from the same bundle, or the explicit not-configured state if remote backup is still absent.

requiredArtifacts.label: Restore-readiness reference
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one rollback-point or restore-readiness reference tied to the same backup-bearing mutation without widening support claims.

diagnosticsProofCapture.summary: Diagnostics proof capture is already preserved for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: keep the bounded diagnostics artifact bundle, controller event linkage, and operator drift note linked while second-target review validates the full Debian 12 packet.

requiredArtifacts.label: Diagnostics operation id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one bounded diagnostics operation id so the Debian 12 proof stays anchored to one controller verification run.

requiredArtifacts.label: Diagnostics artifact paths
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the diagnostics artifact paths from the same run so webpage snapshots and machine-readable evidence stay linked.

requiredArtifacts.label: Controller event reference
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one linked controller event replay or audit-index reference that ties the diagnostics run back to controller truth.

requiredArtifacts.label: Drift operator note
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one short operator note for any drift, degraded verification, or no-drift conclusion from the same diagnostics packet.

rollbackProofCapture.summary: Rollback proof capture is already preserved for debian-12-systemd-tailscale: keep the bounded rollback rehearsal, rollback result, and post-rollback diagnostics linkage tied to the same Debian 12 packet while second-target review stays bounded.

requiredArtifacts.label: Rollback-point id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one rollback-point id selected for the Debian 12 rehearsal so the packet records exactly which recovery anchor was exercised.

requiredArtifacts.label: Rollback operation id
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one bounded rollback operation id so the Debian 12 rollback rehearsal stays anchored to explicit controller truth.

requiredArtifacts.label: Rollback result summary
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture the terminal rollback result summary that states whether the rehearsal applied cleanly or stayed degraded.

requiredArtifacts.label: Post-rollback diagnostics linkage
requiredArtifacts.summary: Capture one linked post-rollback diagnostics artifact path or audit reference from the same rollback rehearsal packet.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Locked target registry
satisfiedCriteria.reason: One explicit locked target profile is already published across controller, CLI, and Web.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Supported target baseline
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Supported-target claims are still locked to one explicit Ubuntu 24.04 + systemd + Tailscale baseline.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Candidate target declared
satisfiedCriteria.reason: One explicit second-target candidate is declared for review.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Bootstrap transport parity
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Bootstrap transport behavior is proven for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Steady-state transport parity
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Steady-state transport behavior is proven for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Backup and restore parity
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Backup and restore behavior is proven for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Diagnostics parity
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Diagnostics behavior is proven for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Rollback parity
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Rollback behavior is proven for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Docs contract ready
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Docs and public contract wording now describe the candidate target honestly.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Acceptance recipe ready
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Acceptance proof steps now exist for the candidate target.

satisfiedCriteria.label: Operator ownership defined
satisfiedCriteria.reason: Operator ownership and support responsibility are defined for the candidate target.

evidenceItems.label: Locked target registry
evidenceItems.summary: Locked target-profile registry now publishes the Ubuntu baseline across controller, CLI, and Web.

evidenceItems.label: Supported target baseline
evidenceItems.summary: Supported-target wording remains locked to ubuntu-24.04-systemd-tailscale.

evidenceItems.label: Candidate target declared
evidenceItems.summary: debian-12-systemd-tailscale is declared as the only review-prep candidate, not a supported target.

evidenceItems.label: Docs contract ready
evidenceItems.summary: Docs contract now freezes candidate-only wording plus review-prep guardrails for Debian 12.

evidenceItems.label: Acceptance recipe ready
evidenceItems.summary: Acceptance recipe now defines the bounded Debian 12 review-prep proof sequence and artifact list.

evidenceItems.label: Operator ownership defined
evidenceItems.summary: Operator ownership document now names who stages hosts, records evidence, and decides whether review stays on hold.

evidenceItems.label: Bootstrap transport parity
evidenceItems.summary: One bounded Debian 12 bootstrap review packet is now preserved with operation, audit, and target-profile evidence while broader support claims stay locked.

evidenceItems.label: Steady-state transport parity
evidenceItems.summary: One bounded Debian 12 steady-state bundle is now preserved with post-bootstrap mutation, /health, /runtime-state, and controller audit evidence while broader support claims stay locked.

evidenceItems.label: Backup and restore parity
evidenceItems.summary: One bounded Debian 12 backup bundle is now preserved with backup operation, manifest lineage, GitHub remote result, and ready rollback-point evidence while broader support claims stay locked.

evidenceItems.label: Diagnostics parity
evidenceItems.summary: One bounded Debian 12 diagnostics bundle is now preserved with operation detail, artifact paths, controller event linkage, and an operator drift note while broader support claims stay locked until review.

evidenceItems.label: Rollback parity
evidenceItems.summary: One bounded Debian 12 rollback rehearsal is now preserved with rollback-point linkage, rollback result summary, and post-rollback diagnostics evidence while broader support claims stay locked until review.
